# verifyEmail

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the verifyEmail mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk verify-email --input.clientMutationId <value> --input.emailId <value> --input.token <value>
```

## Examples
